title: alsine canadensis var. angustata
intro: Alsine canadensis var. angustata, also known as narrow-leaved pygmy wintergreen, is a variety of the Alsine canadensis plant, a species of flowering plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The narrow-leaved pygmy wintergreen is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
